name: skillforge
description: Growing collection of Claude Code skills, each independently installable. Starts with kb (The Brain) — a persistent, cross-session knowledge base.

plugins.name: kb
plugins.description: The Brain — persistent knowledge base across all projects.

plugins.name: guideline-review
plugins.description: Reviews a repo against docs/ENGINEERING_GUIDELINES.md, writes a severity-ranked report, and fixes only what you approve.
